mapper.select: select c.*, d.name as department_name, u.real_name as artist_name from repertoire_info c left join opera_category d on c.department_id = d.id left join sys_user u on c.artist_id = u.id where c.id = #{id}

select c.*, d.name as department_name, u.real_name as artist_name from repertoire_info c left join opera_category d on c.department_id = d.id left join sys_user u on c.artist_id = u.id where c.status = 1 order by c.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into repertoire_info (course_name, course_code, department_id, artist_id, credit, course_type, course_hours, course_desc, status) values (#{courseName}, #{courseCode}, #{departmentId}, #{artistId}, #{credit}, #{courseType}, #{courseHours}, #{courseDesc}, #{status})
